title: As I Watche'd The Ploughman Ploughing
content:
As I watch'd the ploughman ploughing,
Or the sower sowing in the fields--or the harvester harvesting,
I saw there too, O life and death, your analogies:
(Life, life is the tillage, and Death is the harvest according.)
meaning:
"As I Watche'd The Ploughman Ploughing" is a quintessential example of Walt Whitman's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
